title: Scale / Hold Decision Rules — Jun 25 Checkpoint

scale_and_deploy_batch2_if.discovery: At least 3 of 6 URLs discovered by Google (visible in GSC URL Inspection)
scale_and_deploy_batch2_if.technical: No technical issues — all URLs 200, 0 broken links, sitemap correct
scale_and_deploy_batch2_if.indexing_signal: No discovered-not-indexed spike (>50 increase from 503 baseline)
scale_and_deploy_batch2_if.parent_safety: Loan Calculator impressions stable or improving (within 20% of 562 baseline)
scale_and_deploy_batch2_if.crawl_signs: At least 1 URL indexed OR GSC shows crawl activity on new URLs

hold_batch2_if.indexing_issue: New URLs enter discovered-not-indexed immediately without crawl (quality signal problem)
hold_batch2_if.technical_issues: Broken links or errors appear on new URLs
hold_batch2_if.broken_links: Any broken links detected on new URLs

deploy_batch2_requirements: All 5 Batch 2 pages pass doorway audit = SAFE
At least discovery/crawl progress from Batch 1
current_assessment: Day 0 — too early to assess. Reassess Jun 21 (Day 3) and Jun 25 (Day 7).
